step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the chosen option C - Catalyst. To further emphasize my agreement, it's important to note that catalysts also possess high specificity, meaning they often work only on certain types of reactants known as substrates, much like enzymes which have active sites specifically tailored to fit their respective molecules. raw_response:
I agree with the chosen option C - Catalyst. To further emphasize my agreement, it's important to note that catalysts also possess high specificity, meaning they often work only on certain types of reactants known as substrates, much like enzymes which have active sites specifically tailored to fit their respective molecules. This additional layer of precision underscores their unique utility and importance in both laboratory settings and commercial industries alike.
